ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "article_code" TEXT /* Article code for the product */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number associated with the product */,
  "min_break_load" REAL /* Minimum breaking load of the product (in tons) */,
  "diameter_wire_rope" TEXT /* Diameter of the wire rope suitable for the product */,
  "length_A" INTEGER /* Length (A) dimension of the product */,
  "width_B" INTEGER /* Width (B) dimension of the product */,
  "inside_bow_width_C" INTEGER /* Width inside the bow (C) dimension of the product */,
  "inside_bow_length_D" INTEGER /* Length inside the bow (D) dimension of the product */,
  "bow_thickness_E" REAL /* Thickness of the bow (E) dimension */,
  "bow_thickness_F" REAL /* Thickness of another bow (F) dimension */,
  "opening_G" INTEGER /* Opening (G) dimension of the product */,
  "net_weight" REAL /* Net weight of the product (in kg) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID for the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "coating" TEXT /* Coating or protective layer of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date the product was manufactured */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the product */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Wire Rope, Connectors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what products fall under this category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for supplier inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for supplier inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is preferred */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for orders in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this inventory record is tracking */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "last_checked_by" TEXT /* User who last checked the inventory */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inventory level is critical */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Suggested next reorder date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the product is being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
